stories.title: Wembanyama 41/18 — Spurs Down Warriors for 10th Straight Win

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
VICTOR WEMBANYAMA: 41 pts. 18 rebounds.

Second consecutive 40-point double-double — a Spurs franchise first.

San Antonio has now won 10 straight. They're 2 games back of OKC with the tiebreaker.

Wemby is not playing games.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The Spurs are 23-2 since February 1.

They just beat Golden State 127-113. Wemby had 41 and 18.

And if SA and OKC finish TIED in the standings — San Antonio gets the No. 1 seed. They went 4-1 vs. the Thunder this season.

This race is real.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Wembanyama Delivers Back-to-Back 40-Point Double-Doubles as Spurs Win 10th Straight

stories.title: Murray Half-Court Buzzer-Beater — Nuggets Rout Jazz Behind Historic 3-Point Night

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Jamal Murray last night:

37 points.
10 made three-pointers.
Half-court buzzer-beater to end the first quarter.

In a REGULAR SEASON GAME.

Denver's playoff run just got a whole lot more dangerous.

#HoopHeroes #Nuggets #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
10 made threes in a single game is elite company.

Jamal Murray wasn't just on fire last night vs. Utah — he hit a half-court shot as the buzzer sounded.

The Nuggets have Jokic AND this guy. Opponents are not ready.

#HoopHeroes #Nuggets #Jokic

article.headline: Murray Erupts for 37 Points, 10 Threes, and a Half-Court Buzzer-Beater as Nuggets Roll Jazz

stories.title: Celtics 147, Heat 129 — Boston Scorches Historic 53-Point First Quarter

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
The Boston Celtics scored 53 points in the FIRST QUARTER last night.

Final score: 147-129 over Miami.

53 points. One quarter. That's not a hot start — that's a declaration.

Boston is locked in for the playoffs.

#HoopHeroes #Celtics #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Boston dropped 147 on Miami last night.

53 of those points came in the FIRST 12 MINUTES.

Tatum is healthy. The Celtics are healthy. Eastern Conference teams have been warned.

#HoopHeroes #Celtics #NBAPlayoffs

stories.title: Curry Return in Sight — Warriors Need Wins to Hold Play-In Spot

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Steph Curry is targeting THIS SUNDAY vs. Houston.

Warriors are 36-39 and holding the last Play-In spot by a thread. They were 23-16 with Curry. They're 12-22 without him.

7 games left. The math has never been clearer.

#HoopHeroes #Warriors #StephCurry

stories.title: Spurs vs. Thunder — The No. 1 Seed Race Has a Tiebreaker Twist

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The No. 1 seed in the West has a tiebreaker twist.

OKC leads SA by 2 games (60-16 vs. 58-18). But the SPURS went 4-1 vs. the Thunder this season.

If they finish tied — San Antonio is No. 1.

7 games. Every game matters.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #Thunder

stories.title: Pacers Eliminated — Defending Eastern Conference Champions Miss 2026 Playoffs

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
The Indiana Pacers are officially eliminated from the 2026 playoffs.

One year ago, they were Eastern Conference champions.

This is one of the fastest falls from grace in modern NBA history.

#HoopHeroes #Pacers #NBA

stories.title: Cavaliers Magic Number 1 for Playoff Clinch — East Seeds 3-8 Tightening

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
East update (April 2):

Detroit magic number: 2 for No. 1 seed.
Cleveland magic number: 1 to clinch playoff spot.
Play-In: Still a four-team scramble.

Regular season ends April 12. Playoffs April 18.

#HoopHeroes #NBA #NBAPlayoffs
